articles.title: I have always loved taking the santoor into new territory: Rahul Sharma
articles.description: Santoor maestro Rahul Sharma is pushing musical boundaries with his latest single, 'RimJhim – Rainchanted HuRuRu.' Drawing inspiration from Rajasthan's folk heritage and the monsoon's romance, Sharma blends the santoor's cascading notes with contemporary arrangements. This instrumental piece reimagines a beloved Manganiyar folk tune, creating an 'ethnic world music collaboration' that celebrates the joy and serenity of the season's first rains.

articles.title: "Turning into a kpop event": FIFA's bold BTS halftime show move sparks controversy ahead of World Cup final
articles.description: FIFA's announcement of Madonna, Shakira and BTS as performers for the 2026 World Cup final halftime show has sparked intense online debate. While many fans welcomed the star-studded lineup, others argued football is becoming too focused on entertainment. BTS supporters defended the group's inclusion, citing Jungkook's 2022 World Cup performance and the band's global appeal, while critics questioned FIFA's growing emphasis on K-pop and American-style spectacle.

articles.title: "A sign of mistrust": Taylor Swift's father reportedly steps in with strict prenup plan before Travis Kelce wedding
articles.description: Fresh reports claim Travis Kelce has no issue with an alleged prenuptial agreement being prepared ahead of his rumored wedding to Taylor Swift. According to anonymous insiders, Scott Swift has helped create an "ironclad" prenup to protect the singer's business empire and music assets. Sources say Kelce fully supports the decision, viewing it as practical financial planning. However, neither Swift nor Kelce has confirmed the reported prenup or the ongoing wedding speculation.

articles.title: Has Brad Pitt secretly married girlfriend Ines de Ramon?
articles.description: Rumours are swirling that Brad Pitt and Ines de Ramon may have secretly tied the knot. Sources suggest the couple, together since 2022, are "as good as married," with Pitt reportedly referring to de Ramon as his "wife." While a formal wedding isn't a priority for Pitt, de Ramon is reportedly ready to make it official.

articles.title: ‘Checked Prez Trump’s social media’ US Envoy to Israel Huckabee’s hilarious remark draws laughter
articles.description: US Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee joked on Sunday that he checked President Donald Trump's social media accounts before delivering a speech in Jerusalem to ensure he had not been dismissed overnight.Speaking at the JNS International Policy Summit, Huckabee took a light-hearted swipe at Trump's tendency to announce personnel decisions through social media posts.'So today, before I got here, I did something that I thought was very important. I checked President Trump's social media to make sure this was not my last speech in Israel,' Huckabee said.

Her video detailed costs like Rs 85,000 for rent and significant amounts for fitness and investments, sparking varied reactions online about her luxury lifestyle.

articles.title: Bhagyashri Borse drops curious hint on her relationship with her 'Andhra King Taluka' co-star Ram Pothineni
articles.description: Actress Bhagyashri Borse has sparked fresh speculation about her relationship with 'Andhra King Taluka' co-star Ram Pothineni. During a recent interview, Borse referred to Hyderabad as her 'second home,' a comment fans are interpreting as a hint towards a deeper connection with the Telugu film industry and potentially Pothineni. While neither actor has confirmed the rumors, Borse's statement has fueled ongoing fan discussions.

articles.title: 500 plants, 100 birds, 25 butterfly species: At 23, Delhi boy turns home terrace into lush urban forest. How a childhood love for birdwatching sparked a mission to protect urban wildlife
articles.description: Aman Sharma, a 23-year-old Delhi resident, has transformed his 15,000 sq ft terrace into a thriving urban forest, a testament to his passion for wildlife and conservation. This green haven now hosts over 100 bird species and 25 butterfly varieties, showcasing the impact of one young individual's dedication to environmental change. His initiative highlights how simple actions can foster biodiversity in metropolitan areas.

articles.title: Shatrughan Sinha says he benefitted from working with Amitabh Bachchan and Jeetendra: 'Mere sense of humour mein jyada nikhaar aagaya'
articles.description: Veteran actor Shatrughan Sinha reminisced about his film career on Indian Idol, highlighting his strong bond with Amitabh Bachchan and Jeetendra. Sinha praised their camaraderie and support, noting how working with them enhanced his comedic timing. Despite past industry rumors of rivalry with Bachchan, Sinha emphasized their mutual respect and successful collaborations over the years, including films like 'Dostana' and 'Shaan'.

articles.title: 'Maa Inti Bangaram' box office collection Day 4 [LIVE]: Samantha Ruth Prabhu starrer eyes Rs 28–30 crore net by week's end after strong opening weekend run
articles.description: Samantha Ruth Prabhu's 'Maa Inti Bangaram' delivered a rare feat over its opening weekend, three consecutive days of growth rather than the usual weekend plateau. After a Rs. 5.35 crore Day 1, the film jumped 43% on Day 2 to Rs. 7.65 crore and a further 32% on Day 3 to Rs. 10.10 crore, taking its three-day domestic net to Rs. 23.10 crore and worldwide gross to Rs 41.79 crore. As the film enters its first Monday, live tracking shows Rs. 0.82 crore collected so far across 1,236 shows, split Rs 0.77 crore in Telugu and Rs. 0.05 crore in Tamil, pushing the cumulative domestic net to Rs. 23.92 crore. With momentum building with each day, B.V. Nandini Reddy's female-led action-family drama looks well positioned for a strong first week.
